metadata.title:
Primary Election Charges to Be Pre-


ferred With Central Labor Union.

pages.raw_text:
purge the Central Labor union
of grating members is the slo-
gan of the better element of that
organization who are to meet in
the labor headquarters at 612k
Riverside avenue tonight for the
purpose Of submitting primary cleo
ton information against certain
members.


The latter are accused of taking
money from candidates In the
primary campaign and casting dis
credit upon labor organizations to
which they are affiliated as well as
the great mass of labor of the
city.


One of the charges is that the
official ballot turned out by the
labor unions was stolen and the
name of ]. F. Congieton stamped
where the name of J. s. Phillips
had been erased.


E. A. Cooney, vice president OF
the State Federation of Labor,
stated this morning that the bet.
ter element Is in possession OF
names of six undesirable men who
will be openly accused of grating
off politicians, affidavits supporting
the accusations.


This thing is a discredit to or
ganized labor and shall not be
tolerated" says Cooney. IF we
can put the evidence properly be
fore the body those accused will
be drummed out and dishonorably
discharged from further affiliation.
